title: Post-quantum cryptography (PQC)
summary: ANSSI's thematic page presenting post-quantum cryptography as a set of traditional cryptographic algorithms, including key establishment and digital signatures, intended to resist attacks by quantum computers.

title: ANSSI views on the Post-Quantum Cryptography transition
summary: ANSSI position guide on the transition to post-quantum cryptography, describing PQC as a family of cryptographic algorithms and setting out the agency's views on migration. Published on ANSSI's official guides portal, dated 1 February 2026.

title: FAQ on post-quantum cryptography (PQC)
summary: ANSSI FAQ explaining that the transition to post-quantum cryptography rests on the availability of a trusted PQC product offering on the market.

title: ANSSI shares two market studies on post-quantum cryptography
summary: News item announcing two ANSSI market studies on post-quantum cryptography conducted across the French ecosystem.

title: First security visas including post-quantum cryptography
summary: ANSSI announces the first security visas covering products that include post-quantum cryptography, which the agency regards as the most promising path to guard against the quantum threat.

title: Post-quantum cryptography: ANSSI's work
summary: News page describing ANSSI's work on post-quantum cryptography, presented as a new generation of cryptographic algorithms.

title: A Coordinated Implementation Roadmap for the Transition to Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: ANSSI's republication of the EU work stream's roadmap for a coordinated implementation of the transition to post-quantum cryptography. EU-level document co-developed by member states; flagged for routing review against the EUU entry.

title: Quantum and post-quantum cryptography (OPECST Scientific Note No. 18)
summary: Parliamentary scientific note of the Office for the Evaluation of Scientific and Technological Choices covering quantum cryptography and post-quantum cryptography, which relies on classical encryption algorithms.

title: OPECST report No. 4933 (15th legislature) on quantum technologies
summary: Parliamentary report discussing post-quantum cryptography and the standardisation call for PQC algorithms that attracted strong participation.

title: OPECST public hearing record on post-quantum cryptography (session record N119)
summary: Record of a public parliamentary hearing addressing post-quantum cryptography, broadcast on the Senate website. Raw-format committee record; flagged for review against the related Senate hearing report.

title: OPECST hearing minutes of 20 January 2022 on quantum and post-quantum cryptography
summary: Committee minutes distinguishing quantum cryptography, which enables highly secure encryption, from post-quantum cryptography. Possible overlap with the Senate report on the French quantum strategy; flagged for review.

title: National Assembly amendment referencing post-quantum cryptography (open data record)
summary: Open-data record of a parliamentary amendment whose text refers to post-quantum cryptography and communications. Flagged for review as a machine-format legislative document.

title: National Assembly finance committee amendment on quantum technologies and post-quantum cryptography
summary: Finance committee amendment referring to quantum computing, post-quantum cryptography and quantum sensing, citing China's announced series production. Flagged for review as a proposed amendment rather than adopted law.

title: The French quantum strategy (OPECST public hearing report)
summary: Senate report on the French national quantum strategy, including a round table on quantum communications and post-quantum cryptography methods.

title: Senate written question on payment card security and post-quantum cryptography
summary: Written question on the security of card payments facing quantum computing; the government answer notes that ANSSI participates actively in post-quantum cryptography work.

title: OPECST Science and Technology Briefing No. 45 (English)
summary: Parliamentary briefing that mentions post-quantum cryptography in the context of infrastructure resilience. PQC appears only in passing; flagged for relevance review.

title: Quantum computing vocabulary (official terminology list)
issuingOrg: Commission d'enrichissement de la langue française
summary: Official terminology list published in the Journal Officiel defining French quantum-computing terms, including 'cryptographie post-quantique' with the English equivalent post-quantum cryptography.

title: Order of 17 March 2022 approving the specifications of the 'Post-Quantum Cryptography' call for projects
summary: Ministerial order approving the specifications of the France 2030 'Cryptographie Post-Quantique' call for projects under the technology-maturation and R&D action.

title: Law No. 2023-703 of 1 August 2023 on military programming for 2024-2030
summary: Military programming law whose technology priorities explicitly include the transition to post-quantum cryptography alongside other defence capabilities.

title: Resolutions published in the Journal Officiel referencing the post-quantum cryptography transition
summary: Resolution text published in the Journal Officiel stating that the modalities of the post-quantum transition should be adapted to the deployment timetable. Exact instrument unclear from the candidate record; flagged for review.

title: Post-quantum cryptography (National Quantum Strategy portal)
summary: Post-quantum cryptography pillar page of the France 2030 national quantum strategy portal, noting ANSSI's recently updated opinion on PQC migration.

title: Post-quantum cryptography projects (National Quantum Strategy)
summary: Portal page presenting post-quantum cryptography projects funded under the national quantum strategy, including the PQC software-library specialist CryptoNext Security.

title: Call for projects: Post-quantum cryptography (France 2030)
summary: Call for projects carried by the National Quantum Strategy to develop the French post-quantum cryptography offer, operated by Bpifrance under France 2030.

title: France National Quantum Strategy Annual Report 2022
summary: Annual report of the French quantum strategy established in 2021 under the France 2030 plan. The candidate record does not show an explicit PQC passage; flagged for verification.

title: Post-quantum transition: technical objectives (ANSSI)
summary: ANSSI material on the technical objectives of the post-quantum transition, stating that post-quantum security will be strongly recommended for long-term security and listing criteria. Hosted on the third-party PTCC site; flagged for provenance review.

title: ACPR raises ecosystem awareness on preparing for post-quantum cryptography
summary: ACPR publication urging the financial ecosystem to prepare for post-quantum cryptography, describing the PQC migration as a long-term technical undertaking.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography (Banque de France and Monetary Authority of Singapore report)
summary: Joint report by the Banque de France and the Monetary Authority of Singapore on using post-quantum cryptography to strengthen communication and data security against quantum computing advances.

title: Banque de France and Monetary Authority of Singapore conduct a joint post-quantum cryptography experiment
summary: Press release on a Banque de France and MAS experiment integrating post-quantum cryptography. Joint document also relevant to Singapore.

title: Banque de France announces successful experiment securing data with post-quantum cryptography
summary: Press release announcing the success of an experiment securing regulatory data using post-quantum cryptography, which aims to develop protection methods resistant to advanced quantum technologies.

title: Securing central bank regulatory file transfers with post-quantum cryptography
summary: Report on an experiment securing central bank regulatory file transfers, defining post-quantum cryptography as a field focused on algorithms resistant to quantum-computer attacks.

title: Statement on advancing a coordinated roadmap for the post-quantum cryptography transition in the financial sector
summary: Banque de France communiqué relaying a statement on advancing a coordinated roadmap for the transition to post-quantum cryptography in the financial sector, likely linked to the G7 Cyber Expert Group; flagged for routing review.

title: Transition post-quantique d'IPsec (ANSSI-FT-117)
summary: ANSSI technical sheet ANSSI-FT-117 dated 02/02/2026 setting out how to transition IPsec to post-quantum cryptography, replacing current asymmetric mechanisms with post-quantum mechanisms resistant to attacks by classical and quantum computers.

title: Transition post-quantique de SSHv2 (fiche technique ANSSI)
summary: ANSSI technical sheet on the post-quantum transition of SSHv2, describing how to replace current asymmetric cryptographic mechanisms with post-quantum mechanisms. Part of the February 2026 series of ANSSI transition fact sheets.

title: Transition post-quantique de TLS 1.3 (fiche technique ANSSI)
summary: ANSSI technical sheet on the post-quantum transition of TLS 1.3, explaining the replacement of pre-quantum asymmetric mechanisms with post-quantum cryptography. Part of the February 2026 series of ANSSI transition fact sheets.

title: Règles et recommandations concernant le choix et le dimensionnement des mécanismes cryptographiques (ANSSI-PG-083, v3.00)
summary: Version 3.00 of ANSSI's cryptographic mechanisms guide dated 2026-03-20, now adding post-quantum rules and recommendations that complement the classical rules when resistance to quantum-computer-assisted attacks is required, including post-quantum signatures and KEMs.

title: Analyse de risque chiffrement et cryptographie
summary: ANSSI sectoral and technical risk analysis published 27 May 2026 stating that the arrival of a quantum computer is a considerable threat and urging organisations across all sectors to migrate urgently to post-quantum cryptography.

title: Avis de l'ANSSI sur la migration vers la cryptographie post-quantique
summary: French-language version of ANSSI's opinion/position on migration to post-quantum cryptography, published on ANSSI's official guides portal (counterpart to the English 'ANSSI views on the Post-Quantum Cryptography transition').

title: Sécurité des paiements par carte bancaire face au développement de l'informatique quantique (question écrite n°03672)
summary: Senate written question (17th legislature, March 2025, answered June 2025) on quantum-computing threats to bank-card payments; the government answer sets out the transition to post-quantum cryptography, ANSSI's PQC roadmap and France's participation in the EU-coordinated PQC implementation.
